body_html:
yes

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Please advise what I should tell Peg.

Darren

Date: Tue, 04 Apr 2006 12:06:29 -0400
To: DKIESQ@aol.com
From: Peg Ugland pegu@naproperty.com
Subject: Good Friday

Darren,
I hope you are feeling better!
NAPI usually has Good Friday off. It is 4/14/06, a
week from
Friday. Please ask Jeffrey if it is ok to close the
NAPI office. I'm
asking early as NACO has the day off and is
scheduling the carpets to be
cleaned that day. I would like them to schedule
ours also, if we are closed.
Please let me know.
Thanks.
Peg
